goal_text: Task 02772: You are looking for a cheap restaurant and it should be in the south part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. You want to know the address and type of food of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
